# John Smith

## Contact
Phone: +1 (555) 123-4567
Email: john.smith@mit.edu

## Experience

### Senior Software Engineer at Google (2020-2024)
Led development of distributed systems serving 1 billion users.
Technologies: Python, Go, Kubernetes, gRPC.

### Software Engineer at Meta (2017-2020)
Built recommendation engine for Facebook News Feed.
Technologies: Python, PyTorch, Spark.

## Education

### MIT - Bachelor of Science in Computer Science (2013-2017)
GPA: 3.9/4.0

## Skills
Python, Go, Java, JavaScript, TypeScript, React, Node.js, AWS, GCP, Docker, Kubernetes, PostgreSQL, Redis, Kafka
